name: HR Helpdesk Agent
description: An AI-powered HR helpdesk agent that answers employee policy questions, provides FAQ responses, and escalates complex issues to human HR representatives. Covers leave policies, benefits, remote work, expenses, onboarding, performance reviews, code of conduct, and resignation procedures.

skills.name: HR Policy Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve company HR policies including leave, benefits, remote work, expenses, onboarding, performance reviews, code of conduct, and resignation procedures.

skills.name: FAQ Quick Answers
skills.description: Provide quick answers to frequently asked HR questions about passwords, payroll, vacation balance, org chart, and holiday schedules.

skills.name: Issue Escalation
skills.description: Escalate complex or sensitive HR issues to human HR representatives with ticket tracking.

skills.name: Ticket Status Check
skills.description: Check the status of existing HR escalation tickets.
